channel_news.title: Miniso plans larger US stores with more focus on owned IP
channel_news.summary: Miniso plans to open larger stores alongside Walmart, Target and Ulta stores, focusing on those rather than mall stores and highlighting new, owned IP.

channel_news.title: Talent agencies are training creators to act like retailers
channel_news.summary: Talent agencies are training creators to think like retailers, helping them set up online storefronts, prepare for major sales events and show brands hard evidence that their audiences spend money.

channel_news.title: Levain Bakery is scooping up summer traffic with ice cream collaborations
channel_news.summary: Levain Bakery is betting on new ice cream items and collaborations to drive sales during its slow summer months.

channel_news.title: The reality of AI supply chain hype
channel_news.summary: Kearney's 2026 State of Logistics Report shows that AI is helping streamline operations, even as a fully automated supply chain remains a far-off reality.

channel_news.title: AI is now doing parts of merchants’ jobs, managing products and vendors
channel_news.summary: Retailers are beginning to use AI to automate certain parts of the merchandising process, to determine what to order or even make deals on their behalf.

channel_news.title: 5 things to watch for this Prime Day
channel_news.summary: Prime Day is expected to draw more shoppers this year, with consumers hunting for deeper discounts, stocking up on essentials and encountering more AI-powered shopping tools.

channel_news.title: Is Prime Day still worth it?
channel_news.summary: This week's Modern Retail Podcast looked at the pros and cons of participating in Prime Day.

channel_news.title: World Cup tourists go viral for first visits to Buc-ee’s and Walmart. Could brand deals follow?
channel_news.summary: World Cup tourists are going viral for their posts about visiting Walmart for the first time, or trying food from Buc-ee's. Brands are starting to catch on, but it's too early to tell whether this will result in a spike in sales.
